docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DALTON, STEPHEN J. DBA TRADER YORE HEARING SET FOR JUN-09-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DALTON, STEPHEN J. DBA TRADER YORE

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT DALTON, STEPHEN J. DBA TRADER YORE CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-14-2000 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-09-2000, GRANTED
